title: ItemEntityPicker
description: A client-side fabric mod for Player-based ItemEntity Filter
body:
# Item Entity Picker A fabric mod for Player-based item entity filter Player can filter items picked from ground and throw them out if needed automatically ## Command Main command /picker - `/picker help` list usage and descriptions - `/picker` toggle mod on off - `/picker [on/off]` set mod on off - `/picker mode` show current mode - `/picker mode [blacklist, whitelist] ` for mode selection
`Blacklist`: throw any item picked up that Within the Blacklist
`Whitelist`: throw any item picked up Not In the Whitelist (Keep item if in whitelist) - `/picker list` list all items added into blacklist and whitelist - `/picker [add/del] ` add/remove item to/from the current mode list
`item type is Not nbt/component-sensitive` ## Example Usage Useful to filter desire unstackables using whitelist (i.e. Totem_of_undying in raid farm)
